query:
SELECT r.id, r.title, r.image_path, r.console
         FROM roms r
         LEFT JOIN (
             SELECT rom_id, SUM(play_count) as total_play_count
             FROM user_roms
             GROUP BY rom_id
         ) ur ON r.id = ur.rom_id
         ORDER BY COALESCE(ur.total_play_count, 0) DESC, r.title ASC
         LIMIT 50
